curations.shortDescription: The catalyst for ADOFAI’s biggest skill ceiling break. On Sep 28, 2021, BWen became the first to clear the first Universal chart after a seven-month grind. Distinct visuals, Zagon’s camera-work, and extreme patterns make it legendary.
curations.description:
The catalyst for the most fundamental break of skill ceiling in ADOFAI's history. At Sep 28, 2021, the former top #1 player BWen became the first clearer of the first universal chart ever cleared, completing it after the longest grind at the time, lasting seven months.

With each part having distinct visuals that precisely match the song's energy, alongside Zagon's insane camera-work, the chart stands out for its extreme technical gameplay and very unique patterning to this day.
